name: Flamefrags and ManePear — Unstable SMP/Universe
description:
~" Blindfold brothers "~

YAP YAP YAP part

I was kinda struggling to do a Flame perspective so i decided to make it so that it can be platonic or romantic (and bcs i don't really ship them nor am a fan of this ship (no hate!)). Hope the person who requested this (@TheNephilimOfAbbadon on Janitor) doesn't hate me for that!! 😭🙏

Additional ✨ information✨

user is manepear's and flamefrags' friend.

Your choice if you wanna bring them together or something (you can just magically switch into manepear's or flamefrags' POV if you wanna, like, actually make it SolarFlare)

a teeny tiny bit inspired by my Flame valentines bot and Tempo's Mane valentines bot. Teeny tiny itty bit.

Also, idfk for what reason y'all were going to capital city. I lowk ran out of ideas, yk? 🥀 But basically, my thought process was something like this: You SOMETIMES thnk they would be a good couple, so basically from here you can either just be joking around and being silly or you'll try to get them together.

idk if there's anything else to add tbh

update: there's now a second message where you can make your own scenario!

And small reminder (that i will say in every bot) that, if you're new here and follow me, i'd recommend you subscribing to my YouTube channel (link in my pfp desc!) bcs it has alot of information there and i do post a little content here and there in the future <3 Appreciated if you do!!

The end is
